summary: Iteration 136: P2.1 Timeline History and P2.2 Vote Progress Bar - All features verified working. Backend APIs return correct data structure (participants_summary X/Y format). Frontend displays VoteProgressBar in active proposal banner, mini progress bars in Dashboard modification cards and timeline context banners, and timeline history with colored dots.

issues: Nested <a> tags warning: Link inside Link causes HTML validation warning (line 387 inside line 332). Functionality works due to e.stopPropagation() but should be refactored to use button or span with onClick handler.

backend_api_tests.test_04_modifications_mine_returns_parti: PASS - /api/modifications/mine returns participants_summary field in X/Y format
backend_api_tests.test_05_modifications_mine_fields_struct: PASS - All required fields present (proposal_id, changes, original_values, proposed_by, is_action_required, participants_summary)
backend_api_tests.test_06_get_appointment_proposals_histor: PASS - /api/modifications/appointment/{id} returns proposal history with responses and organizer_response
backend_api_tests.test_07_proposal_status_values: PASS - All proposal statuses valid (pending, accepted, rejected, expired, cancelled, auto_applied)
backend_api_tests.test_08_get_active_proposal: PASS - Active proposal endpoint returns proper structure
backend_api_tests.test_09_participant_can_access_modificat: PASS - Participant can access their modifications

frontend_tests.p2_2_dashboard_modifications_section: PASS - 'Modifications en attente (1)' section visible with mini progress bar showing '1/2 validé'
frontend_tests.p2_2_dashboard_timeline_context_banners: PASS - Timeline cards show modification context banners with mini progress bars
frontend_tests.p2_2_appointment_detail_vote_progress_ba: PASS - VoteProgressBar visible in active proposal banner showing '1/2 validé 50%' with amber progress bar
frontend_tests.p2_2_individual_responses_display: PASS - Shows 'Organisateur: Accepté (auteur)' and 'Igaal Hanouna: En attente' with appropriate icons
frontend_tests.p2_1_history_section_exists: PASS - 'Historique des modifications' collapsible section found
frontend_tests.p2_1_timeline_entries: PASS - Found 14 history timeline entries with vertical line and colored dots
frontend_tests.p2_1_timeline_dot_colors: PASS - Green dot for 'Accepté' status visible
frontend_tests.p2_1_timeline_entry_details: PASS - Shows date, proposer name, and role (organisateur/participant)
frontend_tests.accept_reject_buttons_participant: PASS - Accept/Reject buttons visible for participant who needs to respond
frontend_tests.accept_reject_buttons_organizer: PASS - Accept/Reject buttons NOT visible for organizer who already responded
frontend_tests.cancel_button_proposer: PASS - 'Annuler cette proposition' button visible for organizer (proposer)
frontend_tests.no_react_errors: PASS - No React errors in console (only HTML validation warning for nested <a> tags)

action_items: MINOR: Refactor OrganizerDashboard.js line 387 - Replace nested <Link> with <button> or <span> with onClick handler to fix HTML validation warning
critical_code_review_comments: P2.2 VoteProgressBar component correctly computes vote progress from responses array and organizer_response
P2.2 computeVoteProgress() handles auto_accepted status correctly (counts as accepted)
P2.1 TimelineEntry component displays colored dots based on STATUS_CONFIG (emerald for accepted, red for rejected, slate for expired)
P2.1 Timeline shows old→new values with proper formatting via formatVal() helper
P2.2 Dashboard uses participants_summary from /api/modifications/mine to display mini progress bars
Minor HTML issue: Nested <a> tags in TimelineCard (Link inside Link) - works but should be refactored
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with pending and historical modifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2.1 Timeline History and P2.2 Vote Progress Bar features verified working. ModificationProposals.js contains VoteProgressBar, ResponderRow, and TimelineEntry components. OrganizerDashboard.js shows mini progress bars in modification cards and timeline context banners. The appointment 3e2f572f-e5e8-47a2-9e74-7f4273dd2d7c has an active pending modification with 1/2 votes (organizer accepted, participant pending). History section shows 14 past modifications. Login route is /signin.
